message:
test(indexer): align prep-profile tests with 9ct8r staged-shards path [9752r]

Commit 9e6c0ef7 (9ct8r route single-shard rebuilds through staged
atomic publish) moved staged-shard planning BEFORE the
restart-from-zero pre-wipe so the reset could decide whether to
skip the live-index wipe when the staged path will atomically
publish. That change also shifted the prep-profile log sequence:
fresh rebuilds with total_conversations > 0 now go through
rebuild_tantivy_from_db_via_staged_shards which never opens a
live Tantivy writer, so `step="open_tantivy"` and
`step="ready_to_index"` no longer fire for that scenario.

Four tests in src/indexer/mod.rs::tests that asserted the
in-place path's prep-profile sequence needed re-alignment:

1. rebuild_tantivy_from_db_emits_phase_exact_prep_profile_logs
   - Drop `open_tantivy` + `ready_to_index` from the expected
     needle list.
   - Replace the `start_packet_producer < open_tantivy` ordering
     assertion with `start_packet_producer <
     persist_initial_checkpoint`, the staged-path analogue of the
     producer-handoff overlap contract.

2. rebuild_tantivy_from_db_logs_streamed_batch_stats
   - Drop the `flushed a streamed conversation batch` + `chunk_*`
     needles (in-place streaming only).
   - Drop the `exact_checkpoint_persisted` assertion (staged path
     returns false for that flag because it publishes atomically
     rather than via the in-place checkpoint flush).
   - Add the staged-path-specific needles: `running fresh
     authoritative lexical rebuild via staged shard-build path`,
     `built lexical rebuild shard index`, `indexed_docs=4
     shard_conversations=2`, and preserve the path-agnostic
     bounded-page budget diagnostics.

3. rebuild_tantivy_from_db_deferred_startup_emits_deferred_prep_profile_logs
   - Replace `start_packet_producer < open_tantivy` with
     `start_packet_producer < persist_initial_checkpoint` (same
     reason as test 1).

4. rebuild_tantivy_from_db_discards_incomplete_staged_shard_checkpoint_and_restarts
   - Flip `restart_from_zero_reset < plan_lexical_shards` to
     `plan_lexical_shards < restart_from_zero_reset` — the 9ct8r
     fix moved planning before the reset so the reset can see
     whether the staged path will handle the publish.

Each change carries an inline 9ct8r/9752r-rationale comment so a
future reader can trace the prep-profile sequence change back to
its cause without git-archaeology.

Validation: all 4 target tests pass locally via
`CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane3 cargo test --lib
rebuild_tantivy_from_db_{emits_phase_exact_prep_profile_logs,
logs_streamed_batch_stats,
deferred_startup_emits_deferred_prep_profile_logs,
discards_incomplete_staged_shard_checkpoint_and_restarts}`.
Full `cargo test --lib` reports 3986/3986 green. No production
code changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
